name: Md. Mutasim Billah Abu Noman Akanda
aboutMeHeadline: I\'m Md. Mutasim Billah Abu Noman Akanda, looking for funding to pursue my higher studies in Artificial Intelligence related field.
aboueMeDetails: I want to complete my Bachelor\'s degree in Computer Science and Engineering with great skills and have a passion to develop my career as an Academic Expert. I always try to build problem-solving skills myself that makes me work even harder whenever I get a problem to solve. My biggest strength is to work even under pressure with proper time management.

projects.title: ULAB Blood Inventory Management System
